_doc: Backbone model axis for AutoMemoryBench. Every entry is an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint. Endpoints are given as environment-variable placeholders (${OPENAI_BASE_URL}) and resolved at load time; set OPENAI_BASE_URL and OPENAI_API_KEY (see .env.example) to point at any provider that serves the model — the official API, a self-hosted vLLM/SGLang server, or an aggregator. Change model_name to whatever your endpoint exposes. No URLs or keys are stored in this file. For a closed frontier model on a different host, override its base_url via a per-model variable (e.g. ${GPT_BASE_URL}) and export that variable.

_embedding._note: Memory systems that need an embedder use this. Any OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint works; bge-m3 is the reference embedder used in the paper. Defaults to OPENAI_BASE_URL if EMBEDDING_BASE_URL is unset.

gpt-5.5.notes: frontier closed model; point GPT_BASE_URL/model_name at your provider

claude-sonnet-4-6.notes: frontier closed model; use an OpenAI-compatible gateway or set CLAUDE_BASE_URL
